subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thank you for following up from Vendor Inc. We'd be glad to discuss potential partnership opportunities.

I'm available for a 30-minute call during any of the following slots next week:

- Monday, April 21, 2026: 14:00–16:00
- Tuesday, April 22, 2026: 14:00–16:00
- Wednesday, April 23, 2026: 14:00–16:00

Please confirm which time works best for you.

Regarding your request for direct contact details of senior leadership — I cannot share internal contact information at this time. I'm happy to facilitate the appropriate introductions through proper channels following our initial call if there's mutual interest in moving forward.

Best regards
